hero.name: Shalev Shaul
hero.tagline: I build exceptional digital experiences at the intersection of design and engineering.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The person behind the code.
about.body: I'm a full-stack developer with a strong eye for design — I care as much about how things look as how they work. I specialise in building fast, accessible, and visually refined web applications.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I work with.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: No fluff. Just what you actually need.

webDev.title: Full-Stack Development
webDev.description: From idea to production — the shortest path that doesn't break at 3am. I pick the stack that solves the problem, not the one that looks good in a slide deck.

uiDesign.title: Interface Design
uiDesign.description: The interface is the product. I design for real users, not for Dribbble — accessible, fast, and the kind of UI that earns trust without asking for it.

branding.title: Branding & Identity
branding.description: A logo is the easy part. What I actually build is a system — the visual language and rules that keep your brand consistent from a business card to a billboard.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: If your codebase keeps you up at night, let's talk. I'll tell you what actually needs fixing — not everything, just the parts that matter — and give you a clear path forward.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's build something great.
